response.justification: While the candidate possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering and entrepreneurial experience, they lack the specialized, director-level AI and machine learning expertise required for this role. The position demands a recognized AI strategist who can advise enterprise customers, whereas the candidate's background is primarily in full-stack development and open-source GIS platforms, with only recent, limited exposure to AI tooling.
strengths: Meets the 15+ years of required software and infrastructure engineering experience.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive as the founder of an open-source platform (GISCollective).
Strong track record of technical community leadership, including workshops, talks, and open-source development.
concerns: Lacks deep, recognized expertise in AI/ML and AI-powered product development.
No evidence of director-level experience advising strategic customers on technology adoption.
Does not hold the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field.
